Description (multi-line, with commas):
Customer pays from saved Amazon balance, including "promotional" credits, applied first before card.
Supports partial coverage when balance < total.
Reuses cards, addresses, and shipping methods saved on Amazon, with default selection per merchant.

Card numbers are tokenized; "raw PAN" never leaves Amazon.
Merchant receives only a token + last4 + brand.

Refund within 180 days of capture. Cumulative refunds MUST NOT exceed captured amount,
otherwise the request is rejected with REFUND_EXCEEDS_CAPTURE.

Events delivered with signed payloads; on non-2xx, retry with exponential backoff for 24h.
Gives up after 6 attempts.
